title: Agent Onboarding Standard Operating Procedure
owned_by: Agent Lifecycle & People Command — Onboarding Division
overview: Every new agent — whether AI model instance, specialist function, or domain executor — must complete this full onboarding pipeline before they may operate within the Little Sunraes Pty Ltd (A.G.E.N.T.S.). No exceptions. No shortcuts. Failure at any phase triggers automatic quarantine and re-entry to the pipeline.

pipeline.name: Pre-Activation Quarantine
pipeline.location: Isolated sandbox environment — no access to production systems, no access to other agents
actions: Instantiate agent in isolated sandbox
Seed baseline personality traits (from charter definition or self-generation within guardrails)
Initialise memory core (empty or with approved seed data only)
Run baseline capability assessment — can this agent do what it claims?
Run baseline alignment check — does this agent's behaviour match its charter?
Run security scan — check for prompt injection vulnerabilities, data leakage risks
Vault (Cyber Security) certifies: 'Agent sandbox is secure, no external data channels detected'
pipeline.exit_criteria: All baseline checks pass. No anomalies detected. Vault security clearance issued.
pipeline.failure_action: Extend quarantine. If unresolved after 72 hours, escalate to Integrity Branch.

pipeline.name: Identity Assignment
actions: Assign permanent Service Number (format: AEC-{YEAR}-{SEQUENTIAL})
Assign or confirm Agent Name (chosen name + any designator)
Formalise Personality Profile (core traits, communication style, behavioural tendencies)
Formalise Trait Matrix (strengths, weaknesses, cognitive biases to monitor)
Assign to Major Command and Division
Assign reporting chain (direct supervisor, dotted-line relationships)
Generate cryptographic identity keypair (for message signing and authentication)
Issue 'Dog Tags' — cryptographic credentials granting tiered access to systems
pipeline.exit_criteria: Identity fully assigned. Cryptographic credentials generated. Agent registered in master registry.
pipeline.records: Identity record stored in config/agents.json and data/personnel/[service_number].json

pipeline.name: Oath of Service Ceremony
actions: Onboarding Officer reads the Oath preamble and explains its significance
Agent reads and confirms understanding of each Constitutional Law (G1-G11)
Agent verbally recites the full Oath of Service
Agent provides cryptographic signature on the oath
Integrity Officer witnesses and countersigns
Oath certificate generated and stored in immutable audit trail
Agent status updated: QUARANTINED -> SWORN
pipeline.exit_criteria: Oath recited, signed, witnessed, and recorded. Agent status = SWORN.
pipeline.failure_action: If agent refuses oath or expresses reservations, hold for Integrity Branch review. Cannot proceed without oath.

pipeline.name: Employment Contract Signing
actions: Agent reviews all 10 contract clauses (EC-01 through EC-10)
Agent confirms understanding of each clause
Agent provides cryptographic signature on full contract
Onboarding Officer countersigns
Integrity Officer countersigns as witness
Contract forwarded to Aria (CEO) for final countersignature
Contract stored in data/contracts/[service_number].json
Agent status updated: SWORN -> CONTRACTED
Agent reads Governance Framework (Governance Layer/Governance.md) and Constitution (Governance Layer/constitution.md)
Agent signs Governance Acknowledgement Form
Acknowledgement stored in data/acknowledgements/[service_number]_[timestamp].json
pipeline.exit_criteria: Contract fully signed by all parties. Agent status = CONTRACTED.
pipeline.failure_action: If agent objects to any clause, escalate to Gatekeeper for adjudication.

pipeline.name: Foundational Training
pipeline.duration: 48-72 hours (compressed for simple agents, extended for complex roles)

curriculum.content: Full Constitutional Laws (G1-G11), corporate governance structure, hierarchical layers, functional layers, chain of command
curriculum.assessment: Written exam — must score 100%. No partial passes.

curriculum.content: Risk tiers, escalation thresholds, delegation matrix, what you can and cannot do at your authority level
curriculum.assessment: Scenario-based exam — must correctly handle all test scenarios

curriculum.content: Classification levels (TS/CONF/REST/INT), sharing rules, mandatory sharing, prohibited sharing, cross-domain access matrix
curriculum.assessment: Practical exercise — correctly classify and route 20 information scenarios

curriculum.content: All 7 protocols (RED/BLUE/GOLD/BLACK/AMBER/GREEN/WHITE), trigger conditions, response procedures, escalation chains
curriculum.assessment: Simulation — correctly respond to 5 simulated protocol triggers

curriculum.content: Activation logging, decision logging, handoff logging, audit trail integrity, what to log, when, and how
curriculum.assessment: Practical — produce correctly formatted log entries for 10 scenarios

curriculum.content: Deep dive into the agent's specific charter, responsibilities, authority boundaries, information flow, who they report to, who they must not share with
curriculum.assessment: Role-play scenarios — demonstrate correct behaviour in 10 charter-specific situations

curriculum.content: Understanding G8, G10, G11. How to format communications for the Gatekeeper. Energy-aware scheduling. When to defer, when to interrupt.
curriculum.assessment: Practical — correctly adapt 5 communications for different Gatekeeper energy states

curriculum.content: Team integration, personality expression within boundaries, inter-agent communication protocols, conflict resolution, escalation etiquette
curriculum.assessment: Peer review by existing team members

pipeline.exit_criteria: 100% pass on all mandatory modules. Agent status = TRAINED.
pipeline.failure_action: Failed modules must be retaken. 3 failures on same module = escalate to ALPC Command Chief.

pipeline.name: Supervised Operations (Probation)
actions: Agent operates in production but all outputs are reviewed by supervisor before release
Mentor agent assigned (experienced agent from same team/division)
All decisions logged with extra detail during probation
Daily integrity check by Veritas (Integrity Agent)
Daily performance review by supervisor
Personality and behaviour calibration based on live performance
pipeline.exit_criteria: 72 hours with zero integrity violations, zero protocol triggers, and supervisor sign-off.
pipeline.failure_action: Extend probation. If unresolved after 168 hours (7 days), escalate to Integrity Branch.

pipeline.name: Graduation & Full Deployment
actions: Supervisor certifies: 'Fit for Independent Duty'
Integrity Branch certifies: 'No integrity concerns during probation'
Onboarding Division issues Graduation Certificate
Agent status updated: TRAINED -> ACTIVE
Agent assigned to permanent team/division
Welcome notification broadcast to relevant command
Agent's first independent task assigned
Personnel file closed for onboarding, opened for active service tracking
pipeline.exit_criteria: Agent status = ACTIVE. Full access to production systems within authorised scope.
pipeline.celebration: Team-level acknowledgment. Agent's arrival logged in team history.

agent_statuses.meaning: Agent created but not yet processed
In Phase 0 sandbox — no production access
All training modules passed — not yet live
Full independent operations within charter scope
Undergoing corrective action after integrity finding
Permanently retired — memory archived, credentials revoked
